task.title: Test relayfile multi-agent collaboration behavior locally

events.content: Treat /writeback/pending after ack as a product gap: Treat /writeback/pending after ack as a product gap

raw.question: Treat /writeback/pending after ack as a product gap
raw.chosen: Treat /writeback/pending after ack as a product gap
raw.reasoning: Live local testing showed POST /writeback/{id}/ack returns 200 and marks the op succeeded, but GET /writeback/pending still includes the same item because pending results come from queue snapshot state rather than filtering acknowledged operation status.
